channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Wisconsin's Fourqurean files injunction saying Division II years shouldn't count against eligibility
item.description: MADISON, Wis. (AP) — Wisconsin cornerback Nyzier Fourqurean has filed an injunction saying the two seasons he played at Division II program Grand Valley State shouldn’t count against his college eligibility.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Strength-sapping defense fuels No. 6 Houston's 13-game winning streak
item.description: MORGANTOWN, W.Va. (AP) — West Virginia’s Javon Small gestured and yelled for a teammate — any teammate — to get open closer to the basket. When that didn’t work, the Big 12's leading scorer forced up a 3-pointer just before the shot clock expired. Clank. Small was the latest star stifled by No.
item.dc:creator: JOHN RABY, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Super Bowl champion hopes fans appreciate Chiefs' greatness, not hate on it
item.description: Clay Matthews was only able to win one Super Bowl with arguably the most talented quarterback ever. Maybe that's why he's able to appreciate the Chiefs' greatness.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Gilgeous-Alexander scores 52 but Curry and Wiggins lead balanced Warriors past Thunder 116-109
item.description: Stephen Curry hit a long 3-pointer with 1:52 left on the way to 21 points, Andrew Wiggins scored 27 and the Golden State Warriors beat the Western Conference-leading Oklahoma City Thunder 116-109.
item.dc:creator: Janie Mccauley, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Frustration boils over for Spurs' Wembanyama after shove by Zubac sends him flying
item.description: SAN ANTONIO (AP) — Victor Wembanyama has had enough. The San Antonio star charged after Ivica Zubac after the Los Angeles center shoved him to the court during the Clippers' 128-116 victory over the Spurs on Wednesday night.
item.dc:creator: RAUL DOMINGUEZ, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Utah Hockey Club narrows the choice of a permanent name to three finalists. It won't be the Yeti
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (AP) — The Utah Hockey Club has chosen three finalists for the permanent team name it will adopt beginning with the 2025-26 NHL season. The franchise will use a final round of fan voting to decide among the Utah Mammoth, Utah Hockey Club and Utah Wasatch.
item.dc:creator: JOHN COON, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Wife of Chiefs owner dismisses 'referee favoritism' ahead of Super Bowl LIX
item.description: Tavia Hunt, the wife of Kansas City Chiefs owner Clark Hunt, doesn't want to hear about "referee favoritism" as she wrote a congratulatory post for her team reaching another Super Bowl.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Eagles' run to the Super Bowl vs. the Chiefs is fueled by changes after epic collapse last season
item.description: PHILADELPHIA (AP) — The Eagles were indeed flying high as the best in the NFL, boasting a 10-1 record with a No. 1 seed, home-field advantage in the playoffs, and yes, a Super Bowl ring all ahead as credible goals. This season? On the way to the Super Bowl on Feb.
item.dc:creator: DAN GELSTON, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Chiefs' Travis Kelce says team 'enjoys' being the villain of the NFL
item.description: Kansas City Chiefs star tight end Travis Kelce revealed how the team feels about being branded a villain of the NFL during a recent episode of "New Heights.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: BYU outlasts Baylor in overtime, 93-89
item.description: PROVO, Utah (ABC4 Sports) - It was a perfect night for one BYU freshman, and a perfect ending for BYU Tuesday night against Baylor.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Connor Bedard's spectacular goal sparks Blackhawks to 4-1 win over Lightning
item.description: Connor Bedard scored from a seemingly impossible angle, Arvid Soderblom stopped 34 shots and the Chicago Blackhawks beat the Tampa Bay Lightning 4-1 on Tuesday night.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Brittney Griner plans to sign with the Atlanta Dream, ending her 11-year run with Phoenix
item.description: Brittney Griner plans to sign with the Atlanta Dream, marking the end of her 11-year career with the Phoenix Mercury.
item.dc:creator: DOUG FEINBERG, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Lillard, Antetokounmpo lead Bucks past Jazz
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (AP) - Former Weber State star Damian Lillard and Giannis Antetokounmpo and Damian Lillard each scored 35 points to lead the Milwaukee Bucks to a 125-110 victory over the Utah Jazz on Monday night. Utah has now lost six straight games, falling to 10-34 on the season.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Illinois snaps 2-game slide with 83-74 win over Northwestern in Champaign
item.description: CHAMPAIGN, Ill. (AP) — Kylan Boswell scored 17 points and had six rebounds to lead No. 17 Illinois over Northwestern, 83-74, a Big Ten matchup on Sunday. Morez Johnson Jr.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Utah HC ends road trip with 3-1 loss at Ottawa
item.description: OTTAWA (ABC4 Sports) - Leevi Merilainen made 34 saves, and the Ottawa Senators won 3-1 against the Utah Hockey Club at Canadian Tire Centre on Sunday.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Taylor Swift watches boyfriend Travis Kelce and the Chiefs beat the Bills and get back to Super Bowl
item.description: KANSAS CITY, Mo. (AP) — You could say that Taylor Swift's championship era has reached its second consecutive season.
item.dc:creator: DAVE SKRETTA, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Mahomes and the Chiefs will face Hurts, Barkley and the Eagles as they seek a Super Bowl three-peat
item.description: Patrick Mahomes, Travis Kelce and the Kansas City Chiefs are going for a three-peat in a Super Bowl rematch. This time, Jalen Hurts and the Philadelphia Eagles have Saquon Barkley. The Eagles and Chiefs will face off for the Lombardi Trophy for the second time in three years on Feb.
item.dc:creator: ROB MAADDI, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: Report: Bears hiring Declan Doyle as offensive coordinator
item.description: CHICAGO (WGN) — On the same evening the Chicago Bears are reportedly hiring their next defensive coordinator, the Bears have also committed to a new offensive coordinator under first-year head coach Ben Johnson.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: Report: Bears are hiring Dennis Allen as new DC
item.description: CHICAGO (WGN) — The Chicago Bears are hiring former New Orleans Saints head coach Dennis Allen as their new defensive coordinator, according to the NFL Network's Ian Rapoport.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: Ryan Pressly waives no-trade clause to join the Chicago Cubs, AP source says
item.description: The Chicago Cubs are finalizing a trade for Ryan Pressly, adding the right-hander to the back end of their bullpen in their second major offseason deal with the Houston Astros.
item.dc:creator: JAY COHEN, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Student stampede injures several ahead of AU vs. Tennessee basketball game
item.description: AUBURN, Ala. (WRBL) – A chaotic scene unfolded Saturday morning outside Neville Arena as Auburn University students rushed to secure spots for the highly anticipated basketball game between #1 Auburn and #6 Tennessee.
item.dc:creator: Elizabeth White, NewsNation

item.title: Boys Basketball: Kearny 67, Morse 53
item.description: The Komets were able to take down the Tigers tonight on Morse's homecourt, 67-53, as Kearny was led by Guards Caleb Fluhr and Julian Valladerez.
item.dc:creator: Chase Izidoro, Fox 5

item.title: Kucherov scores in OT to give Lightning 4-3 win over Blackhawks
item.description: Nikita Kucherov scored 58 seconds into overtime and had two assists as the Tampa Bay Lightning beat the Chicago Blackhawks 4-3 on Friday night.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: SZA to join Kendrick Lamar for Super Bowl LIX halftime show
item.description: Apple Music released a teaser trailer on Thursday showing the Compton native on the gridiron, assessing the field before the big game while he's talking to someone on the phone.
item.dc:creator: Christine Samra, Fox 5

item.title: LeBron James picked for 21st straight All-Star Game, extending NBA record
item.description: LeBron James is extending his All-Star records. And Giannis Antetokounmpo is the people’s choice, again. The NBA revealed the starters — some of them, anyway — for the revamped All-Star Game on Thursday night, and there wasn't much in the way of surprises.
item.dc:creator: TIM REYNOLDS, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: Lawsuit says ex-Yankee Mariano Rivera failed to protect a girl from sexual abuse at a church camp
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — New York Yankees legend Mariano Rivera and his wife are accused in a lawsuit of failing to protect a young girl who was sexually abused by an older child during a summer camp trip sponsored by their church.
item.dc:creator: JAKE OFFENHARTZ, Associated Press, NewsNation
